description_long: This object consists of a large, curved flat-screen television mounted on a modern wooden entertainment console. The television features a thin, black bezel and a wide, slightly curved display, with a science fiction scene visible on the screen. The console is made of medium-toned wood with horizontal slats on the front, supported by four short legs, and includes a shelf with an electronic device and a red rectangular speaker or accessory on the left side. The back of the television is smooth and black, with a central support stand connecting it to the console. The overall design is sleek and contemporary, suitable for a living room or entertainment area. The materials and construction suggest a combination of plastic, glass, metal, and wood, with a focus on modern aesthetics.
description: A large, curved flat-screen television with a thin black bezel sits atop a modern wooden entertainment console, accompanied by a red accessory and an electronic device on the shelf.
description_view_0: Front view showing the curved screen displaying a sci-fi image, the wooden console, and a red accessory on the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the slim profile of the television, the curve of the screen, and the depth of the console.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth black back of the television, central support stand, and the console's back panel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the television's thinness, the curve, and the red accessory on the right.
